form.formComment: Racing well without winning, recording three minors on end, the latest hitting the ground running with a fast early sectional but finishing in the minors again when third (22.98) over 400m at Warragul. Fought on last time. Has the ability and right in the mix.

form.formComment: Improved sharply when third behind Doongalla Jessie at Horsham last start over 410m (23.46). Good beginner who shouldn't be far away in the run.

form.formComment: In the money last time at this track (24.55) in a Grade 5, finishing a 2.75 lengths second. Has two successes and three minors from six starts from box 3. Suited here and expected to run well.

form.formComment: Strong performance after tracking the speed to win by a neck at Warragul over 460m (27.07) beating Bengal Beast in Grade 5 on March 26. This looks too tough.

form.formComment: Surprised two starts back at this track to win by a neck in 28.92, beating Nobby. Last start finished 4th on March 22 over 510m at this track behind Furious Falcon beaten 6 lengths (29.09) in a Grade 4/5. Prepared to risk this time.

form.formComment: Could only manage fifth last time but placed two on end prior to that, the latest when second (24.70) over 435m at this track. Has to overcome a wide draw and will need to find best.

form.formComment: Solid performance after racing just off the speed to win by 0.8 lengths at Warragul over 400m (22.60) beating Stojanovic in Grade 5 on March 31. Very reliable from this draw. Live chance.
